faqs.question: What types of flies are common in Pelham Gardens homes?
faqs.answer: Pelham Gardens residents most commonly encounter house flies, fruit flies, and drain flies. House flies often enter through doors and windows, fruit flies are attracted to kitchens and garbage areas, and drain flies breed in plumbing. Our treatment addresses all species with targeted methods for each type.
